Usage: claude [options] [command]

Some description.

Options:
  --foo <mode>                          Some long description that wraps onto
                                        another line (choices: "aa", "bb",
                                        "cc")
  -b, --bar                             A boolean flag
  --baz, --baz-alias <value>            Takes a value, no choices

Commands:
  doit                                  Do the thing
  combo|c                               Aliased command
